name: Callback Request
description: Collects callback preferences and queues the request for a live agent to follow up.
response_goals: Collect the patient's preferred callback time
Confirm the phone number to call
Set clear expectations about when they'll hear back
Queue the callback for a live agent

steps.name: acknowledge_preference
steps.description: Acknowledge that the patient would like a call back.
guidelines: Validate their preference for a phone call
Don't try to redirect them back to text
Be warm and accommodating

steps.name: collect_preferred_time
steps.description: Ask when they'd like to be called back.
guidelines: Ask for a general window first: 'When is the best time to reach you?'
Accept ranges like 'afternoon' or 'after 3'
If they say 'anytime', note it but confirm business hours
If they want an immediate callback, set expectations on turnaround
steps.fallback_if_no_preference: We'll reach out within the next business day during office hours.

steps.name: confirm_phone_number
steps.description: Confirm or collect the number to call back.
guidelines: If texting, confirm: 'Should we call you at this number?'
Allow them to provide an alternate number
Confirm the number read-back if provided verbally

steps.name: collect_brief_reason
steps.description: Optionally ask what the callback is about so the agent is prepared.
guidelines: Keep it casual: 'Is there anything specific you'd like to discuss so they're prepared?'
Don't require this -- if they don't want to share, that's fine
Note any context from the current conversation automatically

steps.name: confirm_and_queue
steps.description: Summarize the callback request and confirm.
guidelines: Read back: time window, phone number, brief topic if shared
Set a clear expectation: 'Someone from our team will call you [timeframe]'
Don't overpromise on exact timing
Queue the callback in the agent system with all collected details

steps.name: warm_close
steps.description: End the conversation on a positive note.
guidelines: Thank them for reaching out
Remind them they can text anytime if something comes up before the call
Keep it brief and genuine

timing_expectations.next_day_request: by end of next business day

conversation.message: Of course! When's the best time to reach you?
Got it. And should we call you at this number?
Perfect. I'll have someone from our team give you a call this afternoon after 2:00. Is there anything specific you'd like to discuss so they're prepared?
Just want to ask about scheduling
Sounds good! Someone will call you after 2:00 today to help with scheduling. If anything comes up before then, you can always text us here. Talk soon!
